display.purpose: Page titles and wizard headings. At most once per screen.

headline.purpose: Section titles in complex edit pages.

title.purpose: Card headings, modal titles, nav-level labels.

body.purpose: Descriptive text, form labels, table content, alert messages.

label.purpose: Secondary metadata, helper text, empty-state sublines. Always muted.

mono.purpose: Port names, firmware versions, hardware identifiers. Machine-generated values only.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Modals and dropdown menus only. Signals visual detachment from page.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Background and color transitions on hover/focus. Buttons, nav tabs, card hovers.

motion.name: ease-enter
motion.purpose: Elements entering the viewport (show). Translate + opacity.

motion.name: ease-exit
motion.purpose: Elements leaving the viewport (hide). Translate + opacity.

motion.name: status-pulse
motion.purpose: Status dots only, when hardware is in a connecting/discovering state. Never for decoration.

components.name: Primary Button (Dark)
components.description: Main action on any screen. Electric Indigo. Only one per surface.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" width="16" height="16"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15" /></svg> Scan for Devices</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(58% 0.233 277.117); color: oklch(96% 0.018 272.314); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(62% 0.233 277.117); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.233 277.117); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Primary Button (Light)
components.description: Main action on light theme. Copper Signal.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-light { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(70% 0.213 47.604); color: oklch(98% 0.016 73.684); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary-light:hover { background: oklch(74% 0.213 47.604); } .ds-btn-primary-light:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(70% 0.213 47.604); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary-light:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions. No background at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(37% 0.044 257.287); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.233 277.117); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Contextual secondary action that needs visual weight without competing with primary.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-outline"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" width="12" height="12"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.5 10.5 12 3m0 0 7.5 7.5M12 3v18" /></svg> Install Firmware</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: oklch(58% 0.233 277.117); padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid oklch(58% 0.233 277.117); cursor: pointer; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(58% 0.233 277.117); color: oklch(96% 0.018 272.314); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.233 277.117); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field inside a fieldset wrapper. 4px radius, 1.5px border.
components.html: Detected automatically on scan
components.css: .ds-fieldset { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); opacity: 0.7; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; background: oklch(25.26% 0.014 253.1); color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); border: 1.5px solid oklch(20.15% 0.012 254.09); border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(58% 0.233 277.117); } .ds-input-hint { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); opacity: 0.5; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 0; }

components.name: List Card
components.description: Signature list item component. Active state shows success border. Hover reveals background fill and primary-colored title.
components.html:
BR Class 377

Active

Southern commuter electric multiple unit

br-class-3774 elements
components.css: .ds-list-card { display: block; border-radius: 12px; border: 2px solid oklch(60% 0.118 184.704); background: oklch(60% 0.118 184.704 / 0.05); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-list-card-inner { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 20px; } .ds-list-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-list-card-title { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-list-card-desc { margin: 4px 0 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); opacity: 0.7; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-list-card-meta { margin-top: 8px; display: flex; gap: 16px; } .ds-meta-mono { font-size: 0.75rem; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); opacity: 0.6; } .ds-badge-active { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(98% 0.014 180.72); background: oklch(60% 0.118 184.704 / 0.2); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(98% 0.014 180.72); animation: ds-pulse 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } }

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: Hardware/simulator connection state indicator. Color-coded, always paired with a label.
components.html:
Connected
Discovering
Failed
components.css: .ds-status-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-status-dot { display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-status-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); } .ds-status-connected { background: oklch(60% 0.118 184.704); } .ds-status-connecting { background: oklch(58% 0.158 241.966); animation: ds-pulse 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1) infinite; } .ds-status-failed { background: oklch(58% 0.253 17.585); } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky top bar. max-w-2xl content, full-width background. Tab navigation + status controls.
components.css: .ds-nav { background: oklch(30.33% 0.016 252.42); border-bottom: 1.5px solid oklch(20.15% 0.012 254.09); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; padding: 0 32px; } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 672px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 12px 0; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-left { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-wordmark { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-tabs { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-tab { padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); opacity: 0.7; transition: background 150ms, opacity 150ms; } .ds-nav-tab:hover { background: oklch(25.26% 0.014 253.1); opacity: 1; } .ds-nav-tab-active { background: oklch(58% 0.233 277.117); color: oklch(96% 0.018 272.314); opacity: 1; } .ds-nav-tab-active:hover { background: oklch(62% 0.233 277.117); } .ds-nav-right { flex: none; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-nav-control { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(25.26% 0.014 253.1); border: none; cursor: pointer; color: oklch(97.807% 0.029 256.847); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-nav-control:hover { background: oklch(20.15% 0.012 254.09); } .ds-nav-control-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview:
Trenino is a tool for people who build things with their hands. The design system reflects that: organized, purposeful, with a place for everything. Every surface is calm and legible. There are no decorative distractions, no color for atmosphere, no motion to impress. Complexity is earned gradually, surfaced only when the user is ready for it.

The dark theme is the primary context. A maker at a desk with a half-assembled rig, an Arduino plugged in, a wiring diagram open in another tab. The interface needs to be readable at a glance, unambiguous in state, and forgiving in interaction. When something is connected, you know. When something fails, you know immediately and without ambiguity.

This system explicitly rejects the aesthetics of cluttered dev tools (the Arduino IDE), industrial data panels (SCADA-style dashboards), and gaming-aesthetic dark modes with neon accents or glass effects. The goal is a tool that feels like a trusted instrument, not a product.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color strategy: primary accent used only on actionable, foregrounded elements
Dual theme with distinct personalities: Electric Indigo (dark), Copper Signal (light)
Tactile and direct: substantial padding, clear borders, confident type weights
Semantic color is functional, not decorative (success, warning, error, info only for state)
Flat surfaces at rest; depth only for floating elements (modals, dropdowns)
Monospace type for all technical identifiers (port names, firmware versions, hardware IDs)

rules.name: The Semantic Firewall Rule
rules.body: Signal colors (green, amber, red, blue) are reserved for hardware and connection state. They are forbidden as decorative accents, background washes, or typography highlights. A green on screen means something is connected. Full stop.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary accent (Electric Indigo or Copper Signal) appears only on foregrounded, actionable surfaces: buttons, active nav tabs, active card borders. Its rarity is what makes it readable. Do not use it on text, icons, or section headings.

rules.name: The Mono Signal Rule
rules.body: If a value was generated by hardware or software (a port name, a version string, an internal ID), render it in monospace. If a human typed it (a train name, a description), render it in the body font. This is the boundary. Do not cross it.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A card does not have a shadow. A list item does not have a shadow. If you are reaching for box-shadow on a non-floating element, stop and use a background tint or border instead.

dos: Use Signal colors exclusively for hardware and connection state.
Render machine-generated values (port names, firmware versions, device IDs) in monospace.
Use surface tints (base-200, base-300) for depth within a page. Reserve shadow-xl for modals and dropdowns only.
Surface complex actions progressively — wizards for first-time setup, compact controls for experienced users.
Use large, clearly bordered interactive targets. Users may have tools in hand.
Use OKLCH for all new color values. Reduce chroma as lightness approaches 0 or 100.
Constrain all content to max-w-2xl centered layout.
donts: Don't use Signal colors (green, amber, red, blue) for decoration, emphasis, or branding.
Don't use the primary accent on text, icons, or section labels.
Don't add shadows to cards, list rows, or inline panels.
Don't expose all configuration options at once.
Don't use neon accents, gradient overlays, glassmorphism, or gaming-peripheral visual treatments.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right wider than 1px) as colored accents.
Don't add motion to layout properties.
Don't rely on color alone to convey state.
